papers.title: DynamicBind: predicting ligand-specific protein-ligand complex structure with a deep equivariant generative model

papers.title: Entrepreneurial learning from failure. A systematic review

papers.abstract: Purpose Failure plays a pivotal role in entrepreneurial learning.
